injectable.title: Injected Context
injectable.description: Compact facts selected before or during worker boot.

rag_search.title: Searchable Knowledge Bases
rag_search.description: Standalone corpora that workers query with source-local APIs or graph search.

code_context.title: Code-Connected Evidence
code_context.description: Sources that attach to files, symbols, graph cards, PR history, or external reference edges.
